page.title: Dungeons & World Bosses
page.description: The live game currently has 4 active dungeons, 1 locked dungeon slot, 8 world bosses, and 1 locked boss slot. This page collects the drop tables, spawn rhythm, and real in-game captures in one place.

hero.title: 4 Dungeons, 8 Bosses, 4 Difficulties.
hero.body: Level cap is 100. Daily Dungeon Points stack up to 1,000 and every entry spends from this pool. Parties cap at 8 and the dungeon level locks to the highest-level player in the group. Every image below is straight from the live game.

worldBossRoster.title: 8 Active + 1 Locked
worldBossRoster.subtitle: Each world boss descends at scheduled intervals; the spot is marked on the map. Kraken spawns three times a day, the rest once a day.
worldBossRoster.lockedBody: The ninth World Boss slot is locked. Content is expected to unlock with a future update.

kraken.name: Kraken
kraken.body: The colossal kraken roaming Quinfall's seas. Unlike the other seven bosses it descends three times a day — the most frequently encountered and the most frequently hunted. Only ships can attack it; crew, cannon coordination and seamanship are mandatory.

titanseal.name: Titanseal
titanseal.body: The stone/mountain giant known for its glowing yellow eyes and humped armored body. Heavy strikes plow through the frontline.

aeroForge.name: Aero-Forge
aeroForge.body: Flying boss with a single massive eye-lens and mechanical / steam-age design. Attacks from above — ranged DPS has the edge.

draconarch.name: Draconarch
draconarch.body: A black-scaled great dragon. The classic high-fantasy boss — falls cleanest with a mixed melee + ranged team.

doomcaller.name: Doomcaller
doomcaller.body: Caster/lord-type boss known for blue glowing eyes and mechanical armor. Casting-based attack patterns dominate.

velkhurath.name: Vel'khurath
velkhurath.body: Horned, clawed, dark-green-skinned fiend. Lich/demon aesthetic — high melee threat.

seraphiel.name: Seraphiel
seraphiel.body: White-winged, armored skull-faced angel. A sword-wielding fallen-angel design with 'holy'-themed attacks.

vorgath.name: Vorgath
vorgath.body: A bone-shard giant ogre/beast; dark blue-purple skin, a frontline threat that crushes by sheer mass. Wants a numerous group.

instanced.title: 4 Active + 1 Locked
instanced.subtitle: Each dungeon opens in Solo or Party mode and supports 4 difficulty tiers (Easy → Very Hard). Very Hard has the widest boss-loot pool.
instanced.lockedBody: The fifth dungeon slot is locked. Content is expected to unlock with a future update.

foamingCatacombs.name: Foaming Catacombs
foamingCatacombs.body: A dark cave/underground-themed dungeon, one of the first opened in Quinfall. Entrance ringed with green vegetation.

quietChambers.name: Quiet Chambers
quietChambers.body: An underground dungeon of stone-arched halls and stairs. Candlelight atmosphere.

grimPoint.name: Grim Point
grimPoint.body: A dungeon of stone corridors lit by columns and torches. Tomb / crypt aesthetic.

deepestMaze.name: Deepest Maze
deepestMaze.body: A volcanic / lava-themed dungeon with a red-hot landscape. Visually the most aggressive of the current dungeons.

points.title: Dungeon Points system
points.body: Dungeon Points refill daily and stack up to 1,000. Every entry spends from this pool. Solo entry locks the dungeon to your character level; party entry locks it to the highest-level player in the group.

difficulty.title: Easy → Medium → Hard → Very Hard
difficulty.subtitle: Higher difficulties widen the boss-loot pool and lift drop rates. Critical rule: in Solo mode, drop quality and variety scale with difficulty; in Party mode the SAME table drops at all four difficulties.

veryHard.name: 🔴 Very Hard
veryHard.description: End-game difficulty. The widest, highest-quality boss loot drops here.

solo.title: Solo mode
solo.body: Go in alone and the dungeon locks to your character level. The drop table widens with difficulty and item quality climbs.

party.title: Party mode (max 8)
party.body: Only the party leader can request entry. The dungeon level locks to the highest-level player in the group. The party drop table is identical across all four difficulties.

drops.title: Full List With In-Game Captures
drops.subtitle: Each dungeon: 4 solo difficulty captures + 1 party capture. The numbers below are confirmed by in-game observation.

rule.title: Important rule
rule.body: In Solo mode the drop quality and variety grow with difficulty. In Party mode the SAME item set drops at Easy and at Very Hard — the party table is independent of difficulty.

drops.empty: No drops recorded for this mode.
drops.partyConstant: The party drop table is fixed regardless of difficulty.

prep.title: Dungeon & Boss Tips
prep.subtitle: Practical advice distilled from community runs.

gear.title: Burn the daily 1,000
gear.body: If Very Hard is out of reach, burn the points on Hard or Medium — better than letting them rot. The pool doesn't roll over and unspent equals lost loot.

consumables.title: Buff stack matters
consumables.body: Cooked food + alchemy potion + guild buff stacked together visibly improves drops and survival.

comp.title: Right party comp
comp.body: Party caps at 8. Tank + healer + DPS mix gives the cleanest result. Ranged DPS is critical against aerial bosses like Aero-Forge.

comms.title: Pick the right tier
comms.body: Very Hard has the widest boss-loot pool, but don't force gear you don't have. In a party the difficulty locks to the highest-level player — keep the group balanced.

reset.title: Ships for Kraken
reset.body: Kraken descends three times a day and only falls to a naval crew. Without ships, crew and cannon coordination, an attempt is wasted time.
